name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: The last debate -- be there in Vegas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
This is the last one | | Derek, there’s just one debate left. One last showdown. One final head-to-head battle between a person whose campaign is about defending equality, love, and decency -- and a person who represents his own self-interest and even uglier instincts.

It’s the last time we’ll see Hillary and Trump together onstage -- and we want you there to have her back. **[Add your name now to be automatically entered for a chance to be in the audience as she shows Trump, for the third and final time, what it means to look truly “presidential.”](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hillary’s gotten this far because of everyone in this team who’s stepped up to show their support -- **and with 28 days left, we can’t falter for a second. Are you with her?** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Chip in $1 or whatever you can to be automatically entered to win a trip to the final debate:**
| [

---

**No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 p.m. (all times Eastern) on 10/10/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 10/12/16. Enter by visiting [here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/final-debate-contest/) to donate to Hillary for America or visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter by signing up to volunteer for Hillary for America. Text DEBATE to 47246 to enter by signing up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, signing up to volunteer, or opting-in to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Presidential Debate at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas on 10/19/16; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the Las Vegas area and one (1) night hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: **$2500**). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY3NjE0NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMTQwMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Elite Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Activate your Elite Membership and receive your own personalized Trump Presidential Black Card, reserved for the top 2% of Trump supporters nationwide |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)
You should get one of these, Peter.
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)
[**Contribute a one-time induction fee of $35 to activate your Donald J. Trump Elite Membership now. **](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)

At my inauguration next year, there will be upwards of a million people there, but only a few will have **Presidential Black Cards** and the recognition as leading Trump supporters who really drove our campaign to victory.

This is the final round of **Presidential Black Cards** our campaign will be issuing so please respond before tomorrow at 9 AM to guarantee yours.
**[ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)**
Our effort to defeat Hillary Clinton and turn this country around is more than just a campaign, it is a movement.

In all 50 states, proud Americans are standing up and joining our movement by the millions. Many of them have never been involved in politics before. Until now, they've never had anyone speaking up for them, against the DC elites who have sold us out and rigged the economy against working families.

So while Hillary Clinton calls us "deplorables," **I am 100% PROUD of the people standing with us**...patriotic people who see radical Islamic terrorism, out-of-control crime, jobs shipped overseas, Washington corruption and career politicians doing NOTHING about these problems.

And our people are going to kick the DC elites to the curb so I can bring real leadership to the White House.

**I hope you will emerge as a leader of our movement to rescue America before it is too late, Peter.**

[**Please join the highest ranks of our campaign with a contribution of $35 to activate your Elite Membership now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)

Thanks,

Donald J. Trump
**[ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38081111:Wl-B14bNN:m:1:876315805:055E8E4209E98A586269C8617E6560F6:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---

body:
We need your help to continue funding our aggressive ad blitzes and our campaign’s get-out-the-vote operation. |

Friend, as one of the most dedicated grassroots leaders in the country you know, momentum matters. And right now all the momentum is on our side. But the mainstream media are doing everything they can to prop up Crooked Hillary and downplay the incredible Donald Trump surge happening across the nation. Friend help us keep the momentum DONATE NOW >>> We need your help to continue funding our aggressive ad blitzes and our campaign’s get-out-the-vote operation. We’re making huge gains against Crooked Hillary that you can see for yourself. We’re not just winning national polls like L.A. Times/USC and Rasmussen, we’re beating back the increasingly desperate Dems in the battleground states, too. That’s right -- Donald Trump is ahead in 8 of RealClearPolitics’ battleground states including OH, NV, CO and IA -- and gaining in seven more! Friend, we’re rising just at the right time -- with just under a month left to go before Election Day. Friend, help us keep the momentum DONATE NOW >>> But you know that Crooked Hillary will stop at nothing to defeat us -- and she still has an immense Clinton cash campaign funding advantage to strike back wherever we challenge. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we keep pushing, keep fighting, and keep the pressure on Crooked Hillary right now -- and my father is counting on you to make that possible. With your generous contribution of $5, $15, $25, $50, $100 or even $250 we will deliver an incredible victory for Donald Trump and America. Sincerely, Eric Trump Friend, help us keep the momentum DONATE NOW >>>

name: Bill Bryant
subject: zero tolerance policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
[Update Profile / Unsubscribe](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/private/igrfw8d7se/2I6/FP87cHS/unsubscribe/27661123)

---

| |
---
| | ****
---
| Friend

On Monday, I held a press conference opposing Seattle’s proposal to allow the homeless to camp in our children's parks, athletic fields and on 167 miles of city sidewalks.

Turning our children's parks, play areas and athletic fields into homeless camps risks their health and safety. And, relegating some of the most vulnerable in our midst to the margins of community is not compassionate, it deprives the homeless of the assistance they need to become self sufficient.

Make no mistake, the people experiencing homelessness – a number which has increased by 42% in King County alone since Jay Inslee took office – are in need of our help. But we should not tolerate a program that forces parents to check a football field for discarded needles before their kids' practice.

Seattle’s proposal moves us in the wrong direction. As governor, I will adopt a zero tolerance for camping on state Department of Transportation property and will work with the legislature to withhold homeless funds from cities that permit tent camps in our children's playgrounds and parks.

Now all we need to do is make sure we win this November. With your help we can bring true leadership to the governor’s office and solve our state’s problems – without it we can count on four more years of rudderless mismanagement. **
**[**Can we count on you for $25, $50, $100, or more today?**](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27661123/511/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com%2Fsupport) **
**If you missed the press conference you can read about it and my plan to address homelessness in our community in[the Seattle Times](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27661123/513/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.seattletimes.com%2Fseattle-news%2Fpolitics%2Fgovernor-candidate-bill-bryant-assails-seattle-city-councils-homelessness-bill%2F), [Seattle PI](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27661123/515/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.seattlepi.com%2Flocal%2Fpolitics%2Farticle%2FSeattle-s-homesless-shouldn-t-camp-in-public-9961313.php), and [Crosscut](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27661123/517/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fcrosscut.com%2F2016%2F10%2Fzero-tolerance-for-homeless-camps-says-bryant%2F).

**Bill Bryant**
---
| | | | | | | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27661123/519/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA)

subject: This is your last opportunity to register

body:

Hey,

If you are planning to vote on Election Day, today is your last day to complete or confirm your voter registration. Don't let this opportunity to make your voice heard pass by. Make sure you are registered by 5:00 PM today.

**[Click here to register online to vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3690279382058141696)**

[**Click here to confirm that you 're registered at your current address.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3762336976096069632)

More than one million eligible voters in Missouri are currently unregistered. If you have never registered in Missouri -- or if you have moved since you last registered -- you may be one of them. Luckily, you can complete your entire Missouri voter registration online in just a few steps. [**Click here for instructions.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3690279382058141696)

**Don 't delay -- the deadline to register is TONIGHT at 5:00 PM.**

**[Click here to register online to vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3690279382058141696)**

**[Click here to confirm that you're registered at your current address.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3762336976096069632)**

[**I 'm already registered at my current address, but I'll chip in $5 to help you get out the vote.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5525682981512542208/3618221788020213760?utm_campaign=fnd_vtrreg_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_161012_fnd_gq_vtrreg_ful__tk)

See you at the polls,

Team Koster

clean_body: Hey, If you are planning to vote on Election Day, today is your last day to complete or confirm your voter registration. Don't let this opportunity to make your voice heard pass by. Make sure you are registered by 5:00 PM today. More than one million eligible voters in Missouri are currently unregistered. If you have never registered in Missouri -- or if you have moved since you last registered -- you may be one of them. Luckily, you can complete your entire Missouri voter registration online in just a few steps. Don 't delay -- the deadline to register is TONIGHT at 5:00 PM. See you at the polls, Team Koster PS -- Already registered? who isn't. name: Team Katie
subject: Urgent: moving the needle this week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)
---
This is it --

It's hard to believe, but in just a few days we'll already be halfway through October

This race is still in a **_dead heat_** -- all the polls are within the _margin of error_ -- but with just 27 short days left in this race, it's urgent that we move the needle this week.

[**Hurry, we need to hit our $100,000 mid-October goal before the week is over if we 're going to win this race for working families. Can you pitch in $5 or more? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)
---

We're up against some seriously big-money, and it's clear why. The stakes of this race are through the roof -- let's review:

_**First:**_ Mitch McConnell was blunt about control of the Senate: "I may or may not be calling the shots next year"

_**Then:**_ The _Post-Gazette_ reported the winner of this race "will have say on Supreme Court justices"

_**Now:**_ The _Washington Post_ has upgraded Pennsylvania to the THIRD most likely seat to flip parties -- making this a must-win race.

Look, put it all together, and this is the big take-away: This race is incredibly **__BIG__** and it's incredibly **__CLOSE__**.

[**This is make-or-break. Help us reach our mid-month goal before the deadline >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)

**[Mid-month Goal: Donate now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)**
Not much time --

Team Katie
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 27 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8612906546705203200/2732584362674487296?refcode=e20161012&refcode2=e20161012nd&amount=25)**

name: Erin Wagner, RussFeingold.com
subject: Bumping this RE: Debate
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Our goal is simple. But we need your help to reach it. | Friend, Checking to make sure you saw Russ's email from yesterday. See below. On Friday, Russ will debate Senator Ron Johnson. Russ has been doing his homework, and I don't just mean debate prep (though, he has been doing that, too!). He's spent more than a year on the road, meeting with Wisconsinites, and listening to the ideas and concerns that matter most to them. **[Our goal is simple: We want to show Russ how many supporters have his back. We're asking 1,000 supporters who have not yet donated to step up and give $5 before the debate ends on Friday night.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82a/963971747/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema")** Thanks, Erin Wagner
Digital Content and Design Director \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Tuesday, Oct 11, 2016
Subject: Debate
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82a/963971747/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema") Erin, **This race is close. The latest poll has me just three points ahead of Senator Johnson.** I'm not surprised. We've always known that this race would be close, and we built our campaign to prepare for this scenario. We have 28 days left to go out and win this thing -- and I know we have what it takes to do it. On Friday night, we have another opportunity to show our strength when I debate Senator Johnson. I look forward to engaging with Senator Johnson on the issues Wisconsinites have been talking to me about since I launched this campaign. And I'm excited to highlight the stark contrast between our records. But I need your help. We have precious few days left to make an impact, and I need to make sure every Wisconsin voter hears from my campaign. I'm setting the most ambitious goal of our campaign to date: 1,000 donations from _first-time_ contributors. We have just a few days to make it happen. Can I count on you to join us? **[Help me hit my debate grassroots fundraising goal. Contribute $5 to my grassroots campaign today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82a/963971747/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82a/963971747/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82a/963971747/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45eb/1c469400/8b97d/357e82b/963971747/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_rdf_d1_fwd_nd&utm_campaign=rdf_d1_fwd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Eric Hyers
subject: make or break time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Yesterday, early voting began. **These next 27 days are make or break for this campaign.[Will you help by chipping in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mDKon%2B9SUrhWMgnyFjiR%2F2eKTao%2Bgdzp)**

We can't afford to procrastinate. Voters all over Montana are right now casting their ballots for either Steve or Greg Gianforte.

And the problem is that they are making their choices while Mr. Gianforte is airing thousands more commercials than we are.

**There is no time to waste.[If you haven't yet or are waiting to contribute again, please donate $15 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1Kt8l6vEXAi%2F4eeHi13kuWeKTao%2Bgdzp)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager ****

subject: The stakes are undeniable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f89/1008380618/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f89/1008380618/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f8a/1008380618/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")Time's running out, friends -- and we're losing ground in New Hampshire's race, which will almost certainly decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court. That's why this couldn't come at a more critical moment: **A group of donors is matching online gifts until midnight Friday to win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate -- but ONLY if we hit our $75,750 goal.**
**This is make-or-break.** **[We're counting on you to give now, before the match deadline. If we hit our goal, every dollar of your gift could be DOUBLED to elect Governor Hassan in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f8a/1008380618/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
We HAVE to leverage this incredible match: Right-wing groups (tied to Mitch McConnell, Karl Rove, and the Koch Brothers) have spent $47 MILLION to make sure Maggie doesn't win and Republicans keep their majority, and we're _slipping in the polls._
The stakes of this race are undeniable: _The Washington Post_ reported New Hampshire "is as tight as they come," and Nate Silver says, "**A voter in New Hampshire has 16x more power to determine who controls the Senate than an average American voter."**
That means your gift now -- while we have this rare match opportunity -- could very well be the difference between taking back the Senate and giving control of the Supreme Court to Republicans like Donald Trump and Kelly Ayotte.
**[We need you to give now, $3 or every dollar you can, to help us unlock this extraordinary match before midnight Friday and have your gift go twice as far to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f8a/1008380618/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Thanks so much for taking advantage of this opportunity.
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdadb/2a380d31/1657df10/fc9f8a/1008380618/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyYW0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012am-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Message from Eric Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Eric Trump and Team Virginia** <[info.va@donaldjtrump.com](mailto:info.va@donaldjtrump.com)>
Date: Wed, Oct 12, 2016 at 1:22 PM
Subject: Message from Eric Trump
To: Peter Willis <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

__
Peter --

I just heard that last Saturday, thousands of grassroots activists across the state of Virginia to made phone calls and knocked on doors for my father, Donald Trump.

I am so pleased to here that so many people are rallying behind my dad’s message to “Make America Great Again”!

Between now and Election Day, we will need to all go out and knock on doors and call undecided voters.

That is why I want to CHALLENGE you to [join me](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgoo.gl%2Fforms%2FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=1) and become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team. I am chairing the Trump 500 team in Virginia because one of my favorite properties is in Charlottesville and I know Virginians will work to make a difference. We are looking for 500 new members to commit to making 500 calls on Trump Talk every week of the campaign until Election Day.

Virginia’s Trump 500 Team will be Virginia’s grassroots army that that will ensure a Trump Victory in November. The team will make important voter to voter calls to spread Donald Trump’s message of lower taxes, safer borders, and a more secure economic future.

Become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team today by submitting your information HERE. Make sure you’re signed up on Trump Talk to get started by [CLICKING HERE](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftalk.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=2)!

Join me in sending my Father to the White House by:

1\. Clicking [HERE ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgoo.gl%2Fforms%2FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=3)to join Virginia’s Trump 500 Team

2\. clean_body: \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Eric Trump and Team Virginia <mailto:info.va@donaldjtrump.com> Date: Wed, Oct 12, 2016 at 1:22 PM Subject: Message from Eric Trump To: Peter Willis <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com> Peter -- I just heard that last Saturday, thousands of grassroots activists across the state of Virginia to made phone calls and knocked on doors for my father, Donald Trump. I am so pleased to here that so many people are rallying behind my dad’s message to “Make America Great Again”! Between now and Election Day, we will need to all go out and knock on doors and call undecided voters. That is why I want to CHALLENGE you to and become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team. I am chairing the Trump 500 team in Virginia because one of my favorite properties is in Charlottesville and I know Virginians will work to make a difference. We are looking for 500 new members to commit to making 500 calls on Trump Talk every week of the campaign until Election Day. Virginia’s Trump 500 Team will be Virginia’s grassroots army that that will ensure a Trump Victory in November. The team will make important voter to voter calls to spread Donald Trump’s message of lower taxes, safer borders, and a more secure economic future. Become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team today by submitting your information HERE. Make sure you’re signed up on Trump Talk to get started by ! Join me in sending my Father to the White House by: 1\. Clicking join Virginia’s Trump 500 Team 2\. Clicking "" to sign up for Trump Talk Thanks, Eric Trump Trump Team Virginia Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

body:
What is freedom worth to YOU? Just 27 days until Election Day & your involvement is crucial. |

Friend, Would you invest $20.17 to build a safer, stronger and more prosperous America? It may seem like a strange question, I know. But here’s what I’m getting at. If every one of my father’s supporters who has not yet donated made a one-time contribution of just $20.17, Hillary Clinton’s big-dollar fundraising advantage would be completely wiped away. We’d absolutely blow her numbers out of the water. And why $20.17? Because that’s the year we’re going to change our nation’s course, when my father takes the oath of office and gets to work to Make America Great Again. So I’m making a list, and I’m going to share it with my father tomorrow. It will include the name of every supporter who joins today to help us finish strong and WIN in 27 days. I’d love to add you name to the list. Please JOIN Team Trump today with a $20.17 special contribution – or more if you can – by following this secure link. JOIN NOW We’ve proven the power of grassroots fundraising – shattering records by winning over the American people. And right now, we have all of the momentum on the ground going our way. But Crooked Hillary Clinton continues to raise huge sums from Wall Street banks and special interests, leftist elites like George Soros and Hollywood liberals. This is allowing her to outspend us big time on the airwaves. Make a statement today – help us close the gap, by joining my father in this fight with a $20.17 special contribution. JOIN NOW I’ll add your name to the list right away, and let my father know that you’re on board for this critical final stretch. Thank you – I hope you choose to get involved. Sincerely, Eric Trump P.S. Help us fight back against the Clinton campaign machine, her insider cronies and the lying liberal media – they are DESPERATE to tear down my father and our Republican Party, so they can maintain their grip on power and protect the rigged system in Washington. Join Team Trump today with a $20.17 special contribution, and I’ll add your name to the list I’m going to share with my father. JOIN NOW

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| Friend -- On November 8th voters across West Virginia have the opportunity to elect the first Republican governor in more than 15 years. The Republican nominee, Bill Cole, is my friend and a superb candidate—Bill is a small business owner, job creator, and results driven conservative reformer. I am proud to be on his team. Will you join me in supporting Bill Cole for governor? Click here to make a swift contribution today: https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/evan_jenkins **We simply cannot afford to have a governor whose loyalty lies not with West Virginia families, but Hillary Clinton.** **[Making a donation of $25, $50, or even $150 to Bill Cole’s campaign only takes two minutes, and you can click here to donate right now.

| This isn't good, guys. The newest report shows that Marco Rubio outraised us by more than 3 to 1 last quarter. We raised over $3 million, and we felt really great about that -- until we saw his numbers. **Rubio 's campaign raised $9.6 million dollars.**

That's insane. It's the kind of money you can only raise with the help of the Koch brothers and the NRA. But listen up -- we can fight back. The newest poll has us within just two points. But it's going to take every single grassroots supporter possible to stand up to this flood of right-wing money and come out on top. [**Rush an urgent contribution now >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dbd/738133e4/32d27e00/7f857546/1487347946/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161012?refcode=pme161012_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

We have just 27 days left to make this happen. It's incredibly urgent -- if we let Rubio and the GOP's spending against us continue at this rate, it will be **devastating. [Can you chip in to help us defeat the GOP in Florida and retake the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dbd/738133e4/32d27e00/7f857546/1487347946/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161012?refcode=pme161012_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Thank you for stepping up,
Team Murphy

It's the kind of money you can only raise with the help of the Koch brothers and the NRA. But listen up -- we can fight back. The newest poll has us within just two points. But it's going to take every single grassroots supporter possible to stand up to this flood of right-wing money and come out on top. "" We have just 27 days left to make this happen. It's incredibly urgent -- if we let Rubio and the GOP's spending against us continue at this rate, it will be devastating. "" Thank you for stepping up, Team Murphy | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | "" This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: The next generation of progressive leaders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Real change comes from the bottom up. That's why we're asking for your support of nine local candidates for city council, county boards, mayoral elections, and state legislative offices. [**Split a $3 contribution between these nine candidates and Our Revolution now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-sub-c "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-sub-c")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full")**
Sisters and Brothers,
Some of our strongest progressive leaders start their careers at the local level. After all, before he was elected to Congress, the Senate, and ran for president, Bernie Sanders was first elected Mayor of Burlington, Vermont.
We're proud to support several candidates running for local boards, city councils, mayoral races, and state legislative offices. Real change comes from the bottom up -- that's true not just for our movement, but for the next generation of progressive leaders too. **Meet the next generation of progressive leaders who we can help win in November, then[split a $3 contribution between them and Our Revolution.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full")**
**Julie Ann Nitsch** was a dedicated volunteer and a delegate to the Democratic National Convention for Bernie Sanders' campaign for president. Now she's turning her experience from our political revolution into her own campaign to be a trustee for the board of Austin Community College in Texas, a highly-contested public election with several opponents.
**Ben Choi and Melvin Willis** are independent candidates running for city council in Richmond, California. Ben works for clean energy and wants to hold corporations in the city accountable for cleaning up the environment. Melvin helped families fight foreclosure by big banks during the housing crisis and has pledged not to take any corporate money. They are strong, independent advocates who will make a big impact in their local government.
**Chris Schwartz** is a candidate for the Black Hawk County Board of Supervisors in Iowa. He knows the positive impact government can have for people, and wants to help be a part of that. Chris has been an advocate on progressive issues for 25 years. Now he's running for office to build a movement for workers' rights, environmental protection, and social justice.
**Jesse Arreguin** is running to be the next Mayor of Berkeley, California. The son and grandson of farmworkers, Jesse was the youngest person elected to the city council, where he's helped raise the minimum wage to $15 and expand affordable housing. **Ismael "Ish" Ahmed** is an experienced community organizer who can be elected to Michigan's board of education. Ish wants to build a movement that gives power over public schools back to communities, and invest in early education for kids.
**Justin Wayne** wants to expand economic opportunity and give greater support to our teachers in Nebraska's state senate. **Jason Ritchie** runs a company that builds handicapped-accessible homes, and he's running for Washington State Legislature on a platform of helping seniors and raising the minimum wage.
**Irvin Camacho** is an organizer at heart who has worked with DREAMers and on immigrant rights campaigns. He was inspired to run for state legislature in Arkansas by his parents, who were members of the United Farm Workers who met while working in fields. He's going to build on his advocacy work as a lawmaker. He will be a tireless advocate for working families in Arkansas.
[**These nine candidates are part of the next generation of progressive leaders who will transform our country for years to come. That's why it's important to split a $3 contribution between them and Our Revolution to help them win in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full")
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bottom-up?refcode=em161011-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Justice for Governor
subject: Jim Won Big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/952935233547012096?refcode=home)
**Watch Reaction from Last Night 's Debate **

Last night, Jim Justice was the hands down winner of the final debate. Focus groups and online polls showed West Virginians felt Jim was the more relatable of the two and Bill Cole fell flat.

A focus group made up of four Democrats, four Republicans, and four Independents conducted by Repass Research gave Jim the win 7 - 4. The participants described Senator Cole as "stressed" and Jim as more personable. [Watch it here](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/1024992827584940032?v=adT9I2PmMew&feature=youtu.be).

[WATCH: Recap of debate coverage.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/1024992827584940032?v=adT9I2PmMew&feature=youtu.be)

While Jim shared his vision and big ideas to turn around West Virginia, Senator Bill Cole only offered canned talking points last night. Cole couldn't defend his self-serving agenda that's hurt working families or the $600,000 he wasted failing to pass a budget.

An online poll taken right after the debate by WOWK-TV showed that West Virginians thought Jim won decisively.

The election is right around the corner. Early voting starts October 26. [Click here to read more about Jim's ideas](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/1097050421622867968) to improve West Virginia.

Team Justice

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/952935233547012096?refcode=home)
Paid for by Justice for Governor. Public employees please disregard.
---
Justice for Governor
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1137200022546937856/880877639509084160).

Hello --
We just pulled our records, and it looks like you haven't yet stepped up to help unlock the October match for our race, which will almost certainly decide Senate control and the balance of the Supreme Court.

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad9/2a380d31/16545fa3/fc9c62/427860313/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyX01hdGNoU3VwUmVjX3YxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012_MatchSupRec_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
You're one of Governor Hassan's top supporters -- thank you! But recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would LOSE, so we really need you to make a gift now so that we can take advantage of this match opportunity.
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad9/2a380d31/16545fa3/fc9c62/427860313/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyX01hdGNoU3VwUmVjX3YxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012_MatchSupRec_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
The stakes here in New Hampshire really couldn't be higher. **Nate Silver says that "a voter in New Hampshire has 16x more power to determine who controls the Senate than an average American voter,"** and with corporate special interests spending $47 MILLION and counting to make sure that Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte holds on to this Senate seat, we HAVE to make the most of this match opportunity.
Please, give $3 or more now to double your impact on this critically important Senate race, elect Maggie Hassan, and ensure that we have a Supreme Court that works for everyone, not just those at the top.

But recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would LOSE, so we really need you to make a gift now so that we can take advantage of this match opportunity. "" The stakes here in New Hampshire really couldn't be higher. Nate Silver says that "a voter in New Hampshire has 16x more power to determine who controls the Senate than an average American voter," and with corporate special interests spending $47 MILLION and counting to make sure that Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte holds on to this Senate seat, we HAVE to make the most of this match opportunity. Please, give $3 or more now to double your impact on this critically important Senate race, elect Maggie Hassan, and ensure that we have a Supreme Court that works for everyone, not just those at the top. name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Chris Koster and Obamacare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

The choice in this election is pretty simple. If you support Obamacare and you want more Obamacare, then vote for Hillary Clinton and Chris Koster. He's called expanding Obamacare into Missouri his top priority. If you want to stop Obamacare from killing jobs and hurting people, then I'm working to earn your vote.

[WATCH](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a36d14e81e&e=84041254e6) our new ad and let me know what you think.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=2cb94009ea&e=84041254e6)
More liberal political schemes like Obamacare won't help Missouri families. We need new leadership from outside of the political class to take Missouri in a new direction. That's what I'm offering.

I hope that I can earn your vote on November 8th.

Best,
Eric Greitens

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=173d19230f&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: What would you do with $19 Trillion?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Make sure Mr. Trump wins and puts an end to this wasteful spending. |

Friend, On November 8th, we have a very important decision to make. In fact, it’s a $19 trillion decision. America could choose Crooked Hillary and watch that $19 trillion in American debt skyrocket even more over the next 4 years, or we could choose Donald Trump who will reduce our national debt and get us out from under China’s thumb. We Need To Cut The Debt – I Choose Donald Trump. America’s national debt keeps rising every minute of every day by astronomical amounts. Only a President Trump will reign in the wasteful government spending from these DC politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton. They won’t stick to a budget, so instead they stick you and me with the bill. This needs to stop but it’s up to us to choose wisely. Please join our movement and contribute $35, $50, or $100 to make sure Mr. Trump wins and puts an end to this wasteful spending. We’re being crushed under this ridiculous debt, and we only have the professional politicians to blame for it. Our future generations will be saddled with even more than $19 trillion in debt if we don’t say enough is enough and stop this now. If you are with Mr. Trump I need you to contribute $35, $50, or $100 right now to make sure he gets elected on November 8th. Because Friend, this $19 trillion dollar decision isn’t a decision we can take lightly. Thank you, Brad Parscale Digital Director, Donald J. Trump for President CONTRIBUTE $100

All of these men profit from the establishment Hillary Clinton represents, and like all Republicans in name only do not want to see the establishment overturned. Their lack of courage and leadership is appalling but in no way surprising. As usual John Kennedy is nowhere to be found to answer any real question. John Fleming and Charles Boustany immediately showed their weakness that has led them to fund every Obama budget by throwing Trump under the bus.

**Kennedy, Fleming, Boustany and all the Republicans who backed away from Trump look really stupid right now after Trump knocked it out of the park in last night 's debate.**

**Donald Trump pointed out last night that Hillary Clinton has done nothing in her 30 years of government.** John Kennedy has not solved one problem in his 30 years in government, in fact he's presided and participated in every Louisiana budget disaster as the chief fiscal officer of Louisiana. clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, By assisting the Hillary Clinton Campaign with the most recent assault on the Trump Campaign, John Kennedy, John Fleming, and Charles Boustany have shown once again that they are bought and paid for by the establishment. All of these men profit from the establishment Hillary Clinton represents, and like all Republicans in name only do not want to see the establishment overturned. Their lack of courage and leadership is appalling but in no way surprising. As usual John Kennedy is nowhere to be found to answer any real question. John Fleming and Charles Boustany immediately showed their weakness that has led them to fund every Obama budget by throwing Trump under the bus. Kennedy, Fleming, Boustany and all the Republicans who backed away from Trump look really stupid right now after Trump knocked it out of the park in last night 's debate. The presidential election and our US Senate Race are about whether America will have a growing economy where folks can find jobs, defend life, destroy ISIS, preserve our Second Amendment Rights, overturn the Iran nuclear deal, secure our border, and replace unconstitutional Obamacare with free market solutions that are actually affordable. Donald Trump pointed out last night that Hillary Clinton has done nothing in her 30 years of government. John Kennedy has not solved one problem in his 30 years in government, in fact he's presided and participated in every Louisiana budget disaster as the chief fiscal officer of Louisiana. Maybe that is why he quickly endorsed John Kerry for president, but has failed to support the Trump campaign at crunch time. | | | | Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: The women of Utah deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Last night, we had a rally at the State Capitol building for fair treatment of women.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6136664655235183872/1796321617576659712?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Dear Peter, Last night, we had a rally at the State Capitol for fair treatment of women. I was joined by Charlene Albarran (candidate for U.S. Congress), Catherine Kanter (candidate for SL County Council), and dozens of other women-and men-who agree: The women of Utah deserve better! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6136664655235183872/1796321617576659712?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) **[Pitch in $20 today if you agree!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6136664655235183872/1796321617576659712?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** The current governor has failed for SEVEN years to seriously address the issues faced by Utah women: one in three Utah women will experience sexual violence, women make 70 cents where men make a dollar, and Utah ranks 50th nationally in educational achievement for women. There are solutions to these problems, but our governor has failed to pursue them. In fact, he and his administration often refuse to even acknowledge the issues. Just last night Lt. Governor Spencer Cox responded to the rally calling it a "stunt" and denying that the gender pay gap EVEN EXISTS. I stand proudly with the women of Utah (and modern research) in disagreeing with Lt. Governor Cox. These problems are real, and Utah needs leaders who will fix them-not pretend they don't exist. **[Donate $20 to help us keep standing up for equal pay and treatment of women in Utah!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6136664655235183872/1796321617576659712?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---
Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6136664655235183872/1724264023538731776).

name: Eric Trump and Team Virginia
subject: Message from Eric Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

I just heard that last Saturday, thousands of grassroots activists across the state of Virginia to made phone calls and knocked on doors for my father, Donald Trump.

I am so pleased to here that so many people are rallying behind my dad’s message to “Make America Great Again”!

Between now and Election Day, we will need to all go out and knock on doors and call undecided voters.

That is why I want to CHALLENGE you to [join me](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgoo.gl%2Fforms%2FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=1) and become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team. I am chairing the Trump 500 team in Virginia because one of my favorite properties is in Charlottesville and I know Virginians will work to make a difference. We are looking for 500 new members to commit to making 500 calls on Trump Talk every week of the campaign until Election Day.

Virginia’s Trump 500 Team will be Virginia’s grassroots army that that will ensure a Trump Victory in November. The team will make important voter to voter calls to spread Donald Trump’s message of lower taxes, safer borders, and a more secure economic future.

Become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team today by submitting your information HERE. Make sure you’re signed up on Trump Talk to get started by [CLICKING HERE](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftalk.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=2)!

Join me in sending my Father to the White House by:

1\. Clicking [HERE ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fgoo.gl%2Fforms%2FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=3)to join Virginia’s Trump 500 Team

2\. Clicking [HERE](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Ftalk.donaldjtrump.com-26e-3D55cbdc3c418108187b9250f0f1410cc1-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Dga-5F100816b-26n-3D4%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3D4GQzouuwZ-ZW-0XZ3BJ_Lcn35Q4SoZ-HKRCJjh_B_Gs%26m%3DDu4-CI5Kc3YkEstBhdfCFW76D_44rPB4CfLnr0YfPGo%26s%3DgZdXE0W-0MPdZMCQ0lxUBYiAWJ0mzg4m_e_oAtOzxjI%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=4 "https://talk.donaldjtrump.com") to sign up for Trump Talk

Thanks,

Eric Trump
Trump Team Virginia
[http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrumpva500c&n=5)

DON'T WAIT. This entire election depends on you!

**[Pitch in $5 to Team Bayh's mid-month goal before Saturday's deadline >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50547/7be36b49/1e55b506/78f80bf1/1526358615/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012nd&amount=10")**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Reince=20Priebus?=
subject: Critical Election Day feedback required:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
we must focus on winning in November right now. |

Friend, with Election Day quickly approaching I need you to verify our voter-targeting models by completing the Voter Target Survey right away. BEGIN SURVEY The future of our great country -- and our Party -- is at stake in this election. The party that wins the White House, and controls the Senate and the House will determine the course of our nation... ...from our National Security, to the balance of the Supreme Court, to the future our kids and grandkids will live – it is all on the line just 27 days from now. A record number of Republicans voted in the primaries and it is vitally important we turn each and every one of them out in November. With your help today on the Voter Target Survey you will ensure we’re targeting the right people. Those who will vote for Donald J. Trump for President and for our qualified Senate and House candidates. Friend, we need every bit of your support from now until Election Day to ensure a win. Please let me hear from you today. Thank you, Reince Priebus Chairman
BEGIN SURVEY

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckbaS3sBAC2CmBQxOoaGR2bDRMN6aaaaGR2bBL42LZla?k=A@s~uHuD&U=nf6YvbsiEx_qckYv.Syc&v=S&7=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

---|---
| Greetings,
---
| Thank you for the overwhelming support and response to our emails. **We are so close to hitting our fundraising goal this period!**

**However, our fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight!** While my opponent continues to rely on out-of-state special interests to finance her campaign, I'm proud to lead a campaign where nearly 90% of our financial support comes from Vermonters.

I understand the challenge that it is to donate to political campaigns, because I know that far too many Vermonters are struggling with the growing cost of living. But that's exactly why this election is just too important. _[**Any amount you can give–whether it's $25, $50, $100, $500, $1000, or more–will help us cross the finish line**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=befe6b4721&e=19cebfe173)[.](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4dbf42fe11&e=19cebfe173)_ The outcome of this election is going to come down to who has the most financial resources to connect with Vermont voters.

**[](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=63a1c14eab&e=19cebfe173)****_In order to ensure that we come out on top, I'm asking that you please support my campaign today. The future of our state depends on it._**

Thank you for the support!

Phil
****
---

body:
We can't afford to take our foot off the gas. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45e5/1c469400/aadfc/357f648/4035835807/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_MP_d5_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_MP_d5_nd&utm_campaign=MT_d5&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This week has been a rollercoaster: We've seen polls that show Russ in a commanding lead. Then, we've seen polls that show us within the margin of error --_or even down_. **We always knew this would be a close race. And in this current political climate, we cannot afford to take anything for granted.** **[We must reach our pre-debate goal -- we cannot afford to fall short now. Russ debates Senator Ron Johnson this Friday night. It's our biggest chance to show the stark contrast of how Russ will fight for working families and how Senator Johnson will continue to represent the multi-millionaires and billionaires and Wall Street's corporate agenda.
The Koch network is terrified of losing their "model legislator," Senator Johnson. So far, 12 right-wing groups have spent millions to prop him up -- and just today, we got news that a super PAC is back up on the airwaves with nearly $1 million in ads attacking Russ.
**We'll never match them dollar-for-dollar, but we don't need to. Here's our goal: 1,000 brand-new, first-time donors.**
**[This campaign needs your support now. Contribute $5 and help us reach our goal of 1,000 first-time donors.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45e5/1c469400/aadfc/357f648/4035835807/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-debate-nd?utm_source=ema_2016-10-12_MP_d5_nd&refcode=2016-10-12_MP_d5_nd&utm_campaign=MT_d5&utm_medium=ema")**
After this week's polls, it's more important than ever that we hit this goal.
Thanks,
Cole Leystra
Deputy Campaign Manager

name: John Gregg
subject: The easiest way to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Did you know you can vote RIGHT NOW in Indiana? I'm counting on you to vote early by mail or in person.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8303372775369082880?utm_campaign=fnd_gotev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161012_fnd_gq_gotev_instate__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Did you know you can vote RIGHT NOW in Indiana? Voting early is the easiest way to vote, and a great way to help this campaign. Starting today, you can vote early by mail or in person at your county election office. **Don 't wait -- skip the lines on Election Day by voting early! ** **[Click here to download your vote-by-mail ballot request form.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8375430369407010816?id=8691)** **[Click here to find your county election office and vote early in person.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8447487963444938752?Link=Polling)** We're expecting record turnout in this election -- and voting early is the easiest way to make sure you join your friends and neighbors in being a voter. But did you know that voting early is one of the easiest ways to help me win on Election Day? By banking your vote early, I can focus on reaching out to folks who are less likely to show up on Election Day and help get them to the polls. **Peter, I 'm counting on you. Will you vote early by mail or in person?** **[Yes, I'll download my vote-by-mail ballot request form and vote early!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8375430369407010816?id=8691)** **[Yes, I'll find my county election office and vote early in person!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8447487963444938752?Link=Polling)** **[I'll chip in $5 to help get out the vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8303372775369082880?utm_campaign=fnd_gotev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161012_fnd_gq_gotev_instate__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for doing your part and being a voter! John
| | [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7895691290299987968/8303372775369082880?utm_campaign=fnd_gotev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161012_fnd_gq_gotev_instate__jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

name: Team Maggie
subject: MATCH ALERT: Nate Silver, Elizabeth Warren, and Barbara Boxer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad1/2a380d31/1649e956/fc982c/2472744890/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad1/2a380d31/1649e956/fc982c/2472744890/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
If Governor Maggie Hassan loses here in New Hampshire, Republicans will keep the Senate majority and potentially confirm FOUR of Donald Trump's hand-picked Supreme Court justices.
We can't let that happen, and Senators Sanders, Boxer, and Warren know it. That's why they're doing everything they can for Maggie:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad1/2a380d31/1649e956/fc982d/2472744890/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyX01hdGNoQm94ZXJfdjEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012_MatchBoxer_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
**Nate Silver says that, "A voter in New Hampshire has 16x more power to determine who controls the Senate than an average American voter,"** and a handful of recent polls show that if the election were held today, we would LOSE.
With control of the Senate and up to four seats on the Supreme Court at stake, we HAVE to pull ahead. That's why a group of generous donors has stepped up to match online gifts -- but ONLY if we hit our $75,750 goal by Friday at midnight.
[**Please -- join Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Barbara Boxer and give $3 or more to potentially DOUBLE your impact on Maggie's race, take back the Senate, and ensure that we have a Supreme Court that works for everyone.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdad1/2a380d31/1649e956/fc982d/2472744890/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoib2N0b2Jlci1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDEyX01hdGNoQm94ZXJfdjEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-match?refcode=e20161012_MatchBoxer_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

body:

This is the final round of Presidential Black Cards our campaign will be issuing so please respond before tomorrow at 9 AM to guarantee yours. ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP Our effort to defeat Hillary Clinton and turn this country around is more than just a campaign, it is a movement. In all 50 states, proud Americans are standing up and joining our movement by the millions. Many of them have never been involved in politics before. Until now, they’ve never had anyone speaking up for them, against the DC elites who have sold us out and rigged the economy against working families. So while Hillary Clinton calls us “deplorables,” I am 100% PROUD of the people standing with us . . . patriotic people who see radical Islamic terrorism, out-of-control crime, jobs shipped overseas, Washington corruption and career politicians doing NOTHING about these problems. And our people are going to kick the DC elites to the curb so I can bring real leadership to the White House. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: re: horserace coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Why I'm in this race | | Derek, in the final weeks of a hotly contested campaign, I know it can be tempting to focus on the latest polls and all the gossipy horserace coverage. But today, I want to take a different view.

While the final outcome of this race will have profound consequences for our country, the daily back and forth is not what this campaign is about for me -- it never has been.

This election is about much more than who wins and who loses. It’s an indelible statement about who we are as a nation, our core beliefs, and our course for the future. Just think about that -- think about what it would say about us if we lose.

**I know you’re in this for the same reasons I am -- not just because you want to beat Donald Trump, but because you want to make life better for the people you love. I can’t thank you enough for that, Derek. I’m asking you to step up today, to do just a little bit more in these final weeks, because all those things we want are within reach -- but the only way we can grasp them is together.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY3NzAyNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzE4MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) **

**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjY3NzAyNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzE4MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=61726ae08f&e=84041254e6) with us!

Greitens ' 8-point jump in the governor's race is especially startling..." \---------------- Our campaign is on the rise but we need your help today to make sure we win. That's why I'm writing now to ask that you . We've gained a lot of ground but we need to get the word out about Chris Koster and his corrupt practices. Voters are just now beginning to learn about his record and his desire to expand Obamacare here in Missouri. Help us take Missouri in a New Direction: or donate any amount: Thanks, AC Austin Chambers Campaign Manager Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 St. Louis, Missouri 63108 Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. name: Trump Team Virginia and Eric Trump
subject: A New Challenge from Eric Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

_Oops! Does anyone else hate autocorrect? We apologize for the errors in our last email to you. Please continue to read my message below for all the ways you can help my father make America - and maybe one day autocorrect - great again!_

I just heard that last Saturday thousands of grassroots activists across the state of Virginia made phone calls and knocked on doors for my father, Donald Trump.

I am pleased to hear that so many people are rallying behind my dad’s message to “Make America Great Again!”

Between now and Election Day, we all will need to knock on doors and call undecided voters.

That is why I want to CHALLENGE you to [join me](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fgoo.gl-252Fforms-252FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Derictrumpva500c-26n-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DZuqWIghQyVT0b4TonUcFZDHLTzbiZ4LxmTbBdbnTt4s%26s%3DB49fwFMx3kGO3--f84V6qUVtWH-gnJwlL4sKYdW84wc%26e%3D&e=b020315a7d1a6dd7e10401cfecf0fb1a&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=1&test_email=1&e=ec83357eeb10c544673a439bdbd9e75a&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=1&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=1) and become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team. I am honored to serve as chairman for the 'Trump 500 Team' in the Commonwealth. One of my favorite properties is in Charlottesville, and I know how Virginians can work together to make a difference! The Trump team and I are looking for 500 new members to commit to making 500 calls on Trump Talk every week from now until Election Day.
Virginia’s Trump 500 Team will be Old Dominion's grassroots army that will ensure a Trump Victory in November. The team will make important voter-to-voter calls to spread Donald Trump’s message of lower taxes, safer borders, and a more secure economic future.

Become a member of Virginia’s Trump 500 Team today by submitting your information [HERE](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fdocs.google.com-252Fforms-252Fd-252Fe-252F1FAIpQLSe1dp57T6t3iH-5FuJIB3w9f0GAN1GJ5mfoibXP3eercnEw1MjA-252Fviewform-253Fc-253D0-2526w-253D1-26e-3Dec83357eeb10c544673a439bdbd9e75a-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Derictrump2-26n-3D2-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DS-rH5xfGhnaWRuR8wZL1JUQbnHhZP-OEozGRTuVTnF4%26m%3DyT9VIUN9SfoU-SdjlumMDoAJW0ljo2wuAzlrYmPbBgY%26s%3Do5fGLLs38RGmtZvajK6RBVo5X7D-nFEXwR7NbTsTBsg%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=2). Make sure you also sign up for Trump Talk. To get started, click here and begin making calls immediately!
We have less than a month to send my father to the White House. Join me today by:
1\. Clicking [HERE ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fgoo.gl-252Fforms-252FGJcY566MtY1bSegE3-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Derictrumpva500c-26n-3D3%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DZuqWIghQyVT0b4TonUcFZDHLTzbiZ4LxmTbBdbnTt4s%26s%3DSCiQuloEZ2IiKT-1vz-pADh8vddJ0jL1bbPXY64MLzY%26e%3D&e=b020315a7d1a6dd7e10401cfecf0fb1a&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=3&test_email=1&e=ec83357eeb10c544673a439bdbd9e75a&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=4&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=3) to join Virginia’s Trump 500 Team and

2\. On to victory this November!
Trump Team Virginia
[http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=erictrump2&n=5)

name: Caitlin Mitchell, EMILY's List
subject: [NEW VIDEO] Rose McGowan on Trump >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09bc/24c69fd9/107564d0/18eb0852/2725105066/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all&source=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Actor Rose McGowan is going all-in to defeat Donald Trump this November.

She's not going to let someone who judges women for not being "tens," thinks breastfeeding is "disgusting," and says it's "dangerous" to have women in the workforce get to the White House, and neither are we.

**That's why we're releasing this new Women Can Stop Trump video featuring Rose. Check it out, get fired up, and share with your friends today. ** [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09bc/24c69fd9/107564d0/18eb0853/2725105066/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/videos/10154487387607435/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all&source=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all") It seems like every day we hear a new story about Trump's disdain for women. The revelation that Trump bragged about sexual assault is just the latest news in decades of disparaging comments about women.

If ever there was a time for women to band together and change the course of an election, it's now. Because we HAVE to stop Trump.

**Watch the new Women Can Stop Trump video and make sure your friends see it too:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Watch-Roses-Video](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09bc/24c69fd9/107564d0/18eb084c/2725105066/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/videos/10154487387607435/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWatchRosesVideo&utm_campaign=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all&source=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all")**

Thanks,

Caitlin Mitchell
Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c09bc/24c69fd9/107564d0/18eb084d/2725105066/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all&source=WPENEV14N_digital_email_20161012_WCSTvid4_n-all")

name: Indiana Senate HQ
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809db/520930979/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

**We have bad news.** Out-of-state groups are running wild in Indiana, putting their millions (seriously -- _millions_) behind Congressman Todd Young and spreading lies about Evan. Here's the scariest part: **They 've already _slashed_ Evan's lead.** **But you can help us fight back!
[Pitch in $5 to our mid-month goal by October 15th >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809da/520930979/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012.2nd&amount=10")** These special interest groups know a threat when they see one -- Evan's momentum and his message of bipartisan cooperation for Hoosier families scare them, so they're invading Indiana and meddling with this race.

**[We need your help more than ever in this fight. Chip in $5 now.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809da/520930979/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012.2nd&amount=10")** [](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809d9/520930979/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012.2nd&amount=25") **Hoosiers deserve common-sense solutions from a problem solver like Evan Bayh** , not someone who will do the Koch brothers' bidding. Indiana needs real progress, not a candidate like Congressman Young who calls Social Security a "Ponzi scheme" and takes campaign checks from companies that outsource Hoosier jobs.

**This mid-month deadline is our last before the election, so meeting our goal is crucial to electing Evan and defeating Congressman Young.[We're counting on you. Pitch in $5 now.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809da/520930979/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012.2nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Team Bayh ******[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50544/7be36b49/1e5253c1/78f809d9/520930979/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-octmid-month?refcode=20161012.2nd&amount=25")******
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204
