name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: This is about witnessing LITERAL HISTORY, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
I want you to picture this. | | Derek, this contest ends at midnight tonight, so real quick:

**[Throw your name in the hat to be there in person for the final presidential debate.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Did you click on that?

Look, this isn't just flying for free to Vegas. This is about witnessing LITERAL HISTORY unfolding in front of your eyes.

Picture it: You and a friend are sitting in the live audience waiting while all the TV cameras start rolling. Then our historic candidate walks onto that historic stage and kicks some historic butt. And after it ends, you’ll join the whole auditorium in a deafening round of applause for Hillary.

That's a night you'll be telling friends about for years.

**Take us up on this before it's too late:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Chip in $1 or whatever you can to be automatically entered to win a trip to the final debate:**
| [

---

**No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 p.m. (all times Eastern) on 10/10/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 10/12/16. Enter by visiting [here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/final-debate-contest/) to donate to Hillary for America or visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter by signing up to volunteer for Hillary for America. Text DEBATE to 47246 to enter by signing up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, signing up to volunteer, or opting-in to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Presidential Debate at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas on 10/19/16; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the Las Vegas area and one (1) night hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: **$2500**). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY3NzIyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAyMzYwMjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
